title: Spicy Greek Zucchini Stir-fry
description: This spicy Greek zucchini stir-fry is a crisp and flavorful solo-dinner dish that's perfect for those following a keto-friendly diet.

ingredients.name: keto-friendly seasoning mix (optional)
ingredients.notes: such as garlic powder, onion powder, and paprika

instructions: Slice the zucchini into rounds about 1/8 inch thick.
Arrange the zucchini slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Drizzle them lightly with olive oil and sprinkle with red pepper flakes and any desired keto-friendly seasoning mix.
Roast in the oven for 20 minutes or until tender and slightly browned.
Meanwhile, sauté sliced bell peppers in a pan over medium heat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Cook until softened but still crisp.
Add garlic cloves to the pan and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Return the roasted zucchini slices to the pan along with the cooked peppers. Toss everything together, adding more red pepper flakes if desired.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
